subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-02-09
subcodes.first_line: Mirza Anayatullah has brought us some very interesting news from Acca. He says Mirza Badi'u'llah has circulated a wild report that I am going to be arrested
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men
